What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Enter `...`
3. See error

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
